offer: For freelancers processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late payments. We automate invoice extraction and payment scheduling instead of spreadsheets.
problem: Delayed payments due to manual invoice processing
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
Direct message 20-50 freelancers with a demo video
Join community forums where freelancers share tools
try_it: Let users test invoice extraction on 1-3 invoices
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing invoices
Offer one-click export of simple reports
